/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit_tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/dist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/framework/mock_font_face.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/accent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/big_op.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/fraction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/left_right.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/math_char.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/noad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/overline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/radical.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/script.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/noad/underline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/node/box.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/node/glue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/node/hlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/node/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/node/vlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/node/vstack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/accent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/big_op.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/font_group.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/fraction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/function.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/left_right.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/line.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/math_char.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/math_space.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/radical.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/script.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/tokens.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/parser/unicode_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/units.cpp.o -o unit_tests  ../../src/libmfl.a
